basic_details.job_title: DHS Thanjavur Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Thanjavur (DHS Thanjavur) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Medical Officer Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: Not Specified Age Relaxation: Not Specified

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree awarded by a university or Institution recognised by the UGC for the purpose of its grants. The courses must have been approved by the Medical Council of India / NMC. Should have registered in Tamil Nadu Medical Council.
qualification.details: MBBS Degree awarded by a university or Institution recognised by the UGC for the purpose of its grants. The courses must have been approved by the Medical Council of India / NMC. Should have registered in Tamil Nadu Medical Council.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://thanjavur.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHS Thanjavur Medical Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DHS Thanjavur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DHS Thanjavur Medical Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MBBS Degree awarded by a university or Institution recognised by the UGC for the purpose of its grants. The courses must have been approved by the Medical Council of India / NMC. Should have registered in Tamil Nadu Medical Council.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://thanjavur.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DHS Thanjavur Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHS Thanjavur Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Medical Officer post is 06 August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree from a university recognized by UGC, with courses approved by the Medical Council of India/NMC, and be registered with the Tamil Nadu Medical Council.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 60,000 per month for the Medical Officer post.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Medical Officer post is 21 years. There is no maximum age limit specified in the provided information.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Medical Officer post in the District Health Society Thanjavur.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection criteria for the Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Medical Officer position involves Document Verification and the preparation of a Merit List based on the candidates' qualifications and other relevant factors.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Medical Officer position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Health Society Thanjavur, which is https://thanjavur.nic.in.
